description.value: (You must have Latent Innocence (Cross)) Starting at 11th level you gain the Sword of Exorcism which you can summon on your turn for 6 chakra as an object interaction by transforming the arm you selected with Innocence (Cross) into it. You must pay 3 chakra at the start of every turn that your Innocence (Cross) is in this form. The Sword of Exorcism has the following statistics: Sword of Exorcism, 2d10, Slashing or Force, Deadly, Blocking, Heavy, Reach 1, Blade. Weapon attacks and jutsus that use your Sword of Exorcism can always careful cast around any non Aberrations, Celestials, Demons, Otsutsuki or Monstrosities, it can Interact with any non physical creatures such as ghosts or phantasms, It can be used in place of Cross Spear for any Walker clan hijutsu, it can use constitution for the heavy property and it counts as your Innocence (Cross) and an odachi for the sake of interacting with features and jutsus. Additionally a number of times per long rest equal to your constitution modifier when you would deal damage with this weapon you can deal additional damage as chakra damage equal to half the original damage.
